stories.title: Skubal Returns Tomorrow — The Most Anticipated Start of the Season

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
Tomorrow.

Tarik Skubal — two-time Cy Young, 5 scoreless innings in his rehab start — makes his return to the Tigers rotation.

Detroit is 6-21 without him. The trade deadline is 53 days away.

Every contender is watching.

#Tigers #MLB

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
Skubal is cleared. He starts Friday at Cleveland.

The most anticipated return of the 2026 season. Two-time Cy Young. From surgery to rehab to ready in 38 days.

How does he look? The whole trade deadline could hinge on tomorrow.

#Tigers #MLBTradeDeadline

article.headline: Skubal Returns Tomorrow — The Most Anticipated Start of the 2026 Season

image_concepts.raw:

stories.title: Schwarber 23 HRs — Still Leading the 60-HR Club Race

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
Kyle Schwarber: 23 home runs. MLB lead.

Yordan Alvarez: 22. Judge: IL. Murakami: IL.

Schwarber is alone at the top of the leaderboard — and on a pace for 60+.

Only 5 players in history have ever hit 60 HRs in a season. He could be No. 6.

#Phillies #MLB

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
The 60-HR club has 5 members: Maris. McGwire. Sosa. Bonds. Judge.

Kyle Schwarber has 23 HRs on June 11 and the clearest path to that list of anyone in baseball.

The race is real. The history is real. Watch every at-bat.

#Phillies #MLB

article.headline: Schwarber Has 23 HRs — And the Clearest Path to the 60-HR Club Since Barry Bonds

stories.title: Braves Beat Pirates 3-2 — Best Record in Baseball Continues

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
Down 2-0 in the 7th.

Michael Harris II — bases-clearing double. Three runs score.

Braves win 3-2. Best record in baseball. From 76-86 last year to the best team in the sport.

Walt Weiss is managing the best story in baseball.

#Braves #MLB

article.headline: Harris II Bases-Clearing Double Caps Comeback — Braves 3-2 Pirates, Best Record Continues

image_concepts.label: Image

stories.title: Angels 13-5 Dodgers — Trout and Halos End Season Series With Statement Win

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
The Angels just beat the defending World Series champs 13-5.

Los Angeles vs. Los Angeles, and it wasn't close. The Halos closed out the season series in style.

Mike Trout is still Mike Trout.

#Angels #MLB

article.headline: Angels Rout Dodgers 13-5 — Halos Close Season Series With Statement Win

stories.title: Thursday Night Roundup — Yankees, Cardinals, Athletics All Win

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
Thursday MLB results:

Yankees over Red Sox — Bellinger and Chisholm both homer. 2-0 without Judge.
Cardinals 5, Reds 3.
Athletics 5, Astros 0 — Gage Jump 6.1 scoreless innings.

Season is getting interesting. #MLB
